title: Wenze
contributions: UI, UX, Supabase (backend), Cardano blockchain (wallet connection, ADA payment, escrow smart contract, ADA distribution through Wenze Points)
description: Trusted marketplace for Goma (DRC) enabling online buying and selling of products. Payments in ADA are secured via a Cardano smart contract escrow until confirmed by the buyer. Features include user authentication, integrated messaging, and a WZP points system. Deployed on the Preprod Testnet.

title: Goma Hub-CATS 2026
description: A showcase highlighting the organization and collaboration of teams participating in the CATS 2026 Hackathon under the guidance of the Goma Hub.
